step_by_step_thinking:
The girl has white hair, and 40% of her classmates share the same issue, suggesting a potential genetic component since siblings typically don't display the trait unless genetically linked. Additionally, none of the villagers nor her brother living elsewhere do so, indicating local or specific risk factors rather than a broad environmental one.
\boxed{B} Based on the clustering within the school population and absence among unrelated locals and distant relatives, along with the lack of clear dietary or environmental clues, genetics appear to be the most plausible explanation for the white hair.
